partners.name: Gemini CAD Systems
partners.description: Gemini CAD Systems develops advanced CAD/CAM solutions for apparel and automotive industries, delivering complete digital workflow solutions.

partners.name: TKT Brain Power
partners.description: TKT Brain Power specializes in high-performance plotters and innovative solutions for garment pattern printing and production efficiency.

partners.name: Jindex
partners.description: Jindex develops high-precision inkjet plotting systems designed for advanced garment pattern and marking production and automation.

partners.name: Sinajet
partners.description: Sinajet manufactures intelligent digital cutting systems for multiple industries including apparels and automotive.

partners.name: Konsan Tech
partners.description: Konsan Tech develops innovative automation equipment for textile, furniture, and automotive industries with a focus on spreading,fusing and inspection solutions.

partners.name: Timing Cutter
partners.description: Timing Cutter specializes in intelligent digital cutting systems designed for textile, apparel, leather, and composite material industries.

partners.name: Huatang
partners.description: Huatang manufactures high-speed industrial sewing machines specializing in multi-needle and overlock stitching technologies.

partners.name: S-MAK
partners.description: S-MAK manufactures advanced oval automatic screen printing machines used for high-speed garment and textile printing.
highlights: Widely used in large apparel factories
